summary: Generic KMS operations for the importer-sandbox sample: metadata tagging and rotation toggling. Estate-agnostic sample data.

operations.title: Add a tag to a KMS key
operations.summary: Add a governance tag to a key. Metadata only — no change to what the key protects.
operations.description: Add a single new key/value tag to an existing KMS key's tags map. Metadata-only — no effect on the key policy, grants, or any ciphertext.

params.name: key
params.label: KMS key
params.help: The existing key to tag, chosen from live inventory.

params.name: tag_key
params.label: Tag key
params.help: New tag key, up to 128 chars; must not already exist on the key.

operations.title: Enable automatic key rotation
operations.summary: Turn on yearly automatic rotation of a key's material. Safe and additive — older encrypted data stays readable.
operations.description: Turns on annual automatic rotation of the key's backing material; AWS keeps prior material to decrypt old ciphertext. Purely additive, no impact on existing ciphertext or callers.

params.name: key
params.label: KMS key
params.help: The existing key to modify, chosen from live inventory.

params.name: enable_key_rotation
params.label: Enable automatic rotation
params.help: true turns on yearly automatic rotation of key material; false turns it off.
